overview: A canvas-based 2D car racing game where you pilot a red car through traffic, dodge enemy vehicles, collect power-ups, and chase the highest score.
features: Player red car with smooth arrow key / WASD controls
Enemy black cars spawning and scrolling toward you
Shield power-up restores health; star power-up awards bonus points
Health system, score tracking, pause/resume, and game-over modal
Responsive layout for desktop and mobile
